scenario.name: SIP_INVITE_from_BCF_3x_ADR_references
scenario.send:
INVITE urn:service:sos SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port] From: "NG911 Test" <sip:+12025551212@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: urn:service:sos Call-ID: [call_id] Cseq: 1 INVITE Contact: sip:+12025551212@[local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 Call-Info: <urn:emergency:uid:callid:12345678901:test.system.bcf>;purpose=emergency-CallId Call-Info: <urn:emergency:uid:incidentid:12345678901:test.system.bcf>;purpose=emergency-IncidentId Call-Info: <[$URL1]>;purpose=EmergencyCallData.DeviceInfo Call-Info: <[$URL2]>;purpose=EmergencyCallData.ProviderInfo Call-Info: <[$URL3]>;purpose=EmergencyCallData.ServiceInfo Call-Info: <source_id_ng911_test_9876@test.system.bcf>;purpose=emergency-source Resource-Priority: esnet.0 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- t=0 0 c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000
